response.global_analysis: 1. Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for 'Nekkyo', though the video includes an additional verse (00:39-00:56) and minor lyrical variations not present in the provided JSON; these have been transcribed from audio. 2. The video transitions to a second song, 'Sepia', at 03:17. I have transcribed and translated the 'Sepia' segment using the on-screen hardcoded subtitles as the absolute guide for content and translation. 3. Timestamps are strictly tied to vocal audio, ensuring no 'ghost subtitles' during the instrumental intro and dance sections. 4. On-screen text for song titles has been included at their respective appearances.
